\tzpentry{ID3554}{Wavefunction Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3554 introduces Wavefunction Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \psi_1(r,\theta) \sim r^{\ell_\varphi} e^{i\ell_\varphi\theta} \]
